mapper.select: select m.mem_id, mem_name , mem_pass , mr.role_name from member m left outer join member_role mr on ( m.mem_id = mr.mem_id ) where m.mem_id = #{memId}
select m.mem_id, mem_name , mem_pass , mr.role_name , mem_mail, mem_add1, mem_add2, mem_zip, mem_hp from member m left outer join member_role mr on ( m.mem_id = mr.mem_id )
